mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.assignee_id AS assignee_id, t.task_name AS taskName, t.task_detail AS taskDetail, t.start_date AS startDate, t.due_date AS dueDate, t.completed_date AS completedDate, t.progress AS progress, t.memo AS memo FROM tasks t WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT u.login_id AS loginId, u.user_name AS userName FROM users u
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( assignee_id, task_name, task_detail, start_date, due_date, completed_date, progress, memo ) VALUES ( #{assigneeId}, #{taskName}, #{taskDetail}, #{startDate}, #{dueDate}, #{completedDate}, #{progress}, #{memo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, task_name = #{taskName}, task_detail = #{taskDetail}, start_date = #{startDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, completed_date = #{completedDate}, progress = #{progress}, memo = #{memo} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
